overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district. The player walks along wet sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and passes futuristic elements including a large security mech and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk along glass commercial building

events.description: red sports car drives past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beside a reflective glass building, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the wet multi-lane street

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and blue neon trim
multiple large glowing advertisements and corporate logos on distant buildings
rain-soaked pavement reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall modern street light with glowing white panel
overhead pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked covered sidewalk next to a modern glass office building with blue neon accents. The street to the right has light traffic including a red sports car that passes by. Neon holographic billboards illuminate the distant intersection while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and steps onto the open intersection crosswalk
yellow taxi drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection along marked crosswalk stripes with other pedestrians, moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket and beanie walking in same direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
wide open area where multiple streets meet, surrounded by towering buildings
tall pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals
group of palm trees lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: Having left the covered sidewalk, the scene opens into a vast rain-soaked intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The camera crosses the striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while a yellow taxi passes through the intersection. Palm trees line the destination sidewalk ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with palm trees and commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past palm trees and illuminated storefronts, approaching a area with vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding an umbrella walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground-level shops with glowing signs and large display windows
dark building wall with various small signs and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite side of the street past commercial storefronts with glowing signage and palm trees lining the curb. The heavy rain continues to create reflections on the tiled sidewalk. The camera approaches a section with colorful vending machines and a large security mech visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian area with vending machines and security mech

events.description: encounters large stationary security mech standing guard near colorful vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past the stationary security mech and row of vending machines under the building overhang

notable_agents.action: large security mech standing stationary on the sidewalk near vending machines, appearing to guard the area

entered.detail: large bipedal robotic mech with dark armor plating and glowing elements
row of colorful automated vending machines with bright pink, purple, and red illumination
large overhead structure with glowing pink and blue neon lights spanning the street ahead
overhead covering from the building providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: Passing under a building overhang into a semi-covered area featuring a large stationary security mech and a row of brightly colored vending machines. The neon archway ahead glows with pink and blue light, while the wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding illumination. The area feels more enclosed compared to the open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sleek corporate corridor through a sprawling neon intersection and into a dense commercial alley. It begins along a rain-soaked covered sidewalk beside a glass office building with blue neon accents, passing a red sports car as holographic billboards glow in the distance. As the camera leaves the shelter of the building, the scene opens into a vast, rain-drenched intersection where the camera crosses a striped crosswalk amidst towering advertisements and passing yellow taxis. The movement then shifts toward the opposite sidewalk, passing glowing storefronts and palm trees before approaching a cluster of colorful vending machines. Finally, the camera moves under a building overhang into a more enclosed area, passing a large stationary security mech beneath a pink and blue neon archway.
